source_policy: Only compact synthetic public-safe source summaries with public_test_fixture_only use are eligible; repository presence does not confer eligibility.
review_policy: Every record is draft_unreviewed with an unassigned role placeholder; validator output grants no human, legal, compliance, biosafety, publication, or release approval.
truth_boundary: Deterministic public-safe development fixture and validation scaffold only; not protected-holdout evidence, human-approved gold, runtime behavior, or production approval.
notes: Manifest expectations are independently checked against all 20 JSONL records. No protected query hash or private storage identifier is included.
